function.name: timestamp_to_time
function.description: Convert Unix timestamp to readable time string.
function.long_description: Converts a Unix timestamp to a readable time format with hour, minute, second components and full datetime.
example_user_queries: Convert timestamp 1710000000 to a readable time using %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S.
Show timestamp 1672531200 as a human-readable date and time.
What time does timestamp 1740787200 represent in %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S?
